text: A transformer architecture can be constructed to efficiently solve the task of assembling large numbers of molecular fragments into molecular structures.
source_excerpt: we show how a transformer architecture can be constructed to efficiently solve the task, traditionally performed by chemists, of assembling large numbers of molecular fragments into molecular structures.

text: The framework demonstrates effectiveness on molecules with up to 19 heavy (non-hydrogen) atoms.
source_excerpt: We demonstrate the effectiveness of this framework on molecules with up to 19 heavy (non-hydrogen) atoms

text: For molecules with up to 19 heavy atoms, there are trillions of possible structures.
